chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D- 2211 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of Misc. No.9921 /22 3. For hearing of main case. 04.08.2025. This is an old petition of 2022 which is over 03 years old. On the last date of hearing none was present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. Today once again none is present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
